tools.name: Report Streamliner
tools.description: This tool streamlines the process of combining multiple CSV or Excel files, aggregating data based on a common key, and generating a consolidated report.

tools.name: Report Streamliner
tools.description: This tool streamlines the process of combining multiple CSV or Excel files, aggregating data based on a common key, and generating a consolidated report.

tools.name: Recall Navigator
tools.description: This tool helps you manage knowledge points, apply spaced repetition for better retention, and generate daily review lists.

tools.name: Momentum Catalyst
tools.description: This tool helps users overcome procrastination by guiding them to define tiny, actionable "ignition tasks" for large projects, providing timed focus sprints, and logging progress to build momentum.

tools.name: Content Current Catalyst
tools.description: This tool generates a weekly content strategy and specific post ideas for small businesses, helping them align their social media with their goals and audience, and exports the plan to Markdown and CSV files.

tools.name: FocusFlow Guardian
tools.description: This tool analyzes your meeting schedule from a CSV file and proposes dedicated focus blocks to help you balance collaborative time with essential deep work, exporting the suggested schedule to a new CSV file.

tools.name: Presence Weaver
tools.description: This tool guides you to set an intention before engaging in digital activities and prompts you to reflect afterward, helping you cultivate presence and intentionality in your digital life.

tools.name: Insight Loom
tools.description: This tool guides users to identify key concepts and define relationships between them from their notes or text, then saves the structured knowledge and a visual concept map.

tools.name: Paper Parrot
tools.description: This tool extracts key arguments, methodologies, and findings from academic PDF papers and transforms them into structured questions and answer prompts, fostering active recall and deeper understanding for better knowledge retention.

tools.name: Decision Digestor
tools.description: This tool extracts potential action items, decisions, owners, and due dates from unstructured text (like chat logs or meeting notes) and compiles them into a structured CSV report, helping you cut through communication noise.

tools.name: Commentary Clarity Catalyst
tools.description: This tool analyzes YouTube comment sections on productivity videos to identify the gap between curated content and the real-life struggles users face, aiming to bridge that gap with more relatable and actionable advice.

tools.name: Flow Anchor
tools.description: This tool helps you proactively create and communicate your deep work focus blocks by generating ICS calendar files and customizable status messages from a simple CSV input.

tools.name: Synthesis Spark
tools.description: This tool helps you synthesize disparate learning notes or articles into structured knowledge by identifying key concepts and relationships, then generates recall questions to reinforce understanding.

tools.name: Ambient Prompt Weaver
tools.description: This tool takes a CSV file of tasks and their associated time blocks, then generates minimalist HTML "cue cards" for each block, displaying a single, gentle task reminder meant to be a quiet ambient prompt.
